pain_desire: Companies spending $10k–$100k+/mo on LLM API calls face exploding inference costs. Multiple independent builders (Switchpoint AI, PureRouter, Humiris, NadirClaw, RouteLLM by UC Berkeley/Anyscale) confirm the pain is real. Feb 2026 Reddit threads still active on honest LLM API cost comparisons. Enterprise teams want automated cost reduction with zero code changes — just swap the API endpoint.
